modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with phone numbers starting with 677

full_description_text:  
My phone isn't working right.  
Voicemail isn't set up properly.  
I need help resetting my PIN and have some billing questions about the 677 lines.  
Also, I want to add some analog phone lines.
short_description: Issues with phone numbers starting with 677
description:
